data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Messages are secured with end-to-end encryption, preventing interception.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes the Signal Protocol for securing messages.

data.title: Two-step Verification
data.description: Two-step verification is available to enhance account security.
data.technical_spec: Optional feature requiring a six-digit PIN when registering phone number.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Continuous auditing of systems to mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Involves code review, penetration testing, and security updates.

data.title: Spam Detection Mechanisms
data.description: Automated systems to identify and block spam messages.
data.technical_spec: Includes algorithms and user reporting systems to flag inappropriate content.

data.title: Data Leak Prevention
data.description: Procedures and technologies are in place to prevent data leaks.
data.technical_spec: Includes data encryption and user access management.
